Mauro Tassotti Returns to Milan Futuro to Assist Bonera Amid Relegation Crisis
arts.sum: AC Milan have taken decisive action to address the dire situation facing their Milan Futuro team, which is battling to avoid relegation to Serie D. In a significant move, the club has announced the return of Mauro Tassotti, a legendary figure in Milan's history, who will join Daniele Bonera's coaching staff to help stabilize the team and guide them out of trouble. arts.ttl: Champions League | Feynoord v AC Milan: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Feyenoord will face AC Milan in the Champions League knockout playoff round with a series of key players sidelined. Manager Brian Priske has been sacked, leaving the Dutch side in turmoil ahead of a huge match in prospect. Austrian defender Gernot Trauner is unlikely to feature for a third consecutive match. The absence list also includes goalkeeper Justin Bijlow, as well as Calvin Stengs, Chris-Kevin Nadje, and Ramiz Zerrouki. Timon Wellenreuther is expected to continue in goal for the Dutch side.
